name: Cosmo Energy Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Cosmo Energy Holdings Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, engages in the oil business in Japan and internationally. The company operates through three segments: Petroleum, Petrochemical, and Oil Exploration and Production. Its Petroleum segment produces and markets gasoline, naphtha, kerosene, gas oil, heavy oil, crude oil, lubricants, liquefied petroleum gas, asphalt, and other petroleum products. The company's Petrochemical segment produces and sells ethylene, mixed xylene, para-xylene, benzene, toluene, petrochemical solvents, and other petrochemical products. Its Oil Exploration and Production segment develops, produces, and sells crude oil. The company also engages in the wind and solar power generation business. In addition, it leases cars for individual customers. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
